summary: Backend-only testing for SonicBet after adding 11 new games (total 17). All 19 pytest cases passed against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Validated /api/games returns all 17 ids (incl. dragon-hatch, wild-bandito, mahjong-ways, gates-olympus, sweet-bonanza, sugar-rush, lucky-neko, aztec-gold, aviator, crazy-time, plinko), register+login flow w/ welcome bonus R$10, cookie + Bearer token auth, wallet balance, deposit-pix (amount=20 increases balance), play_game for both old (fortune-tiger, mina-misteriosa) and new (aviator, gates-olympus, plinko, crazy-time) ids, 404 for unknown game, recent-winners list, 6 promotions.

minor.issue: Sets cookies with secure=True + samesite='none' (correct for cross-site preview domain), but no rate limiting on register/login - susceptible to brute-force / spam account creation.
MOCKED by design - instantly credits balance without any gateway verification. Documented as intentional.
RNG uses random.random() (not cryptographically secure). Acceptable for demo, but flag for production-readiness.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 857 lines - consider splitting into routers (auth.py, wallet.py, games.py, promotions.py) for maintainability (>700 line guideline).
JWT_SECRET is read at import time via os.environ['JWT_SECRET']; missing env var would crash the app fast (good), but no fallback / clearer error message.
withdraw endpoint requires total_bet >= 100 but error math `100 - user.get('total_bet', 0)` can show negative values if total_bet > 100 (currently guarded by the outer < 100 check, OK).

GAMES dict is in-memory; if server restarts mid-bet there's no transactional safety - bets and wallet updates aren't atomic (separate update_one calls on wallets + users + game_history). Consider Mongo transactions.
No input sanitization on phone field beyond digit stripping; relies on Pydantic str only.
recent_winners endpoint does N+1 user lookups inside the loop - replace with a single $lookup aggregate or $in query.
No data-testid attributes verified in frontend (frontend testing was out of scope this run).
test_credentials: Auto-generated random phone numbers in tests (e.g. 119XXXXXXXX, password Test1234). No pre-seeded admin/test users in repo; /app/memory/test_credentials.md not present.
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates a new user with a random 11-digit BR mobile phone. Welcome bonus (R$10) + R$20 PIX deposit + several R$5 bets are written to MongoDB. No teardown - test data accumulates but is keyed by unique random phones so it does not collide.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_sonicbet_api.py uses pytest + REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env. If new games are added, extend EXPECTED_GAME_IDS set and the parametrized test list. Frontend (HeroCarousel, GameThumbnail, Home.js) was NOT tested this iteration per request - if asked, validate carousel auto-rotation, all 17 game thumbnails render, modal flows (login/register/deposit) and play interaction.
